hero.title: Grey House
hero.subtitle: Villas.
hero.description: A private 3,000 sqm sanctuary perched 400 meters above the Ionian Sea. Hand-crafted from natural stone, designed for the eternal horizon.

philosophy.heading: Born from
philosophy.paragraph1: The architecture of Grey House Villas is a dialogue with the land. Every exterior wall is hand-laid from local natural stones, creating a structure that feels less like a building and more like an extension of the mountain itself.
philosophy.paragraph2: Inside, the boundaries dissolve. Continuous stone flooring flows from the hearth to the terrace, framing the Ionian Sea as the ultimate centerpiece. Surrounded by ancient olive groves and orchards, it is a sanctuary of silence and light.

interior.heading: Furnished with
interior.description: Delivered turnkey, Grey House Villas are curated with a selection of Dutch, Italian, and Greek designer furniture. Practical luxury is woven into the fabric of the estate, from high-end Italian kitchens to advanced climate control systems.
features: Underfloor heating powered by advanced heat pumps
Integrated electronic access and central sensors
Estate-wide WiFi boosters for seamless connectivity

gallery.heading: Captured
gallery.description: A glimpse into life at Grey House. From the golden hour over the Ionian Sea to the intricate textures of Katouna stone.
